title: Order processing backlog cascades to catalog updates
description: Order service queue processing falls behind, preventing catalog updates from being acknowledged, causing catalog-service to stall.

logs.message: Task queue processing rate dropped from 50/sec to 12/sec
Worker pool saturation detected: 95% of workers processing long-running transactions
Catalog sync acknowledgment timeout: waiting >4000ms for order service response
Inventory sync messages queuing up: unable to commit stock reductions to order-service
Backlog of pending updates: 847 sync requests waiting for acknowledgment
PUT /products returned 503: catalog-service unable to accept updates
Cache invalidation requests delayed but not failing

alerts.message: Order service processing latency spike suggests worker pool contention
Catalog service sync backlog growing: orders service not acknowledging updates

ground_truth.correct_fix: Increase WORKER_CONCURRENCY from 20 to 50; kubectl set env deploy/order-service WORKER_CONCURRENCY=50; or optimize transaction processing logic
